'''wadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scaevity|scaevity]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scaevity|scaevity]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wadaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædækæth|wædækæth]] || [[word:wædækæj|wædækæj]] || [[word:wædækæsh|wædækæsh]] || [[word:wædækæ|wædækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadadakath|wadadakath]] || [[word:wadadakaj|wadadakaj]] || [[word:wadadakash|wadadakash]] || [[word:wadadaka|wadadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadakath|wadakath]] || [[word:wadakaj|wadakaj]] || [[word:wadakash|wadakash]] || [[word:wadaka|wadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadafkath|wadafkath]] || [[word:wadafkaj|wadafkaj]] || [[word:wadafkash|wadafkash]] || [[word:wadafkaf|wadafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadakatha|wadakatha]] || [[word:wadakaja|wadakaja]] || [[word:wadakasha|wadakasha]] || [[word:wadakaka|wadakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadakath|wadakath]] || [[word:wadakaj|wadakaj]] || [[word:wadakash|wadakash]] || [[word:wadaka|wadaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadakathal|wadakathal]] || [[word:wadakajal|wadakajal]] || [[word:wadakashal|wadakashal]] || [[word:wadakakal|wadakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadakathatha|wadakathatha]] || [[word:wadakajaja|wadakajaja]] || [[word:wadakashasha|wadakashasha]] || [[word:wadakaka|wadakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadakathan|wadakathan]] || [[word:wadakajan|wadakajan]] || [[word:wadakashan|wadakashan]] || [[word:wadakakan|wadakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadakathaoro|wadakathaoro]] || [[word:wadakajaoro|wadakajaoro]] || [[word:wadakashaoro|wadakashaoro]] || [[word:wadakakaoro|wadakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
